deep learning.title: Neural Network from Scratch
deep learning.description: Implement a 2-layer neural network using only NumPy without any ML frameworks. Train it to classify MNIST handwritten digits.

deep learning.title: Image Classification CNN
deep learning.description: Build a Convolutional Neural Network to classify CIFAR-10 images into 10 categories using PyTorch or TensorFlow.

deep learning.title: Real-Time Object Detection System
deep learning.description: Build a production-ready object detection system using YOLOv8 with a custom-trained model. Deploy with FastAPI and stream video results.

pytorch.title: PyTorch MNIST Digit Classifier
pytorch.description: Build your first neural network with PyTorch to classify handwritten digits. Implement custom training loops and model evaluation.

pytorch.title: Transfer Learning Image Classifier
pytorch.description: Fine-tune a pre-trained ResNet-50 model on a custom image dataset (e.g., flower species or dog breeds) using PyTorch's transfer learning.

pytorch.title: Custom Transformer Architecture from Scratch
pytorch.description: Implement the full Transformer architecture (Multi-Head Attention, Positional Encoding, FFN) from scratch and train it on a text classification task.

nlp.title: Sentiment Analysis Classifier
nlp.description: Build a text sentiment analyzer for product reviews using NLTK and Scikit-learn. Implement TF-IDF features and evaluate with precision/recall.

nlp.title: Named Entity Recognition (NER) System
nlp.description: Fine-tune BERT on a named entity recognition task using the spaCy and Hugging Face Transformers library.

nlp.title: Document Q&A Engine with FAISS
nlp.description: Build a full document retrieval + Q&A system using Hugging Face embeddings, FAISS vector search, and a generative model for answers.

llms.title: ChatGPT-Style CLI Chatbot
llms.description: Build a command-line chatbot using the OpenAI API with conversation memory, streaming responses, and system prompt engineering.

llms.title: Document Summarizer with LLM
llms.description: Build a PDF/document summarizer using LangChain's map-reduce chain with chunk processing for long documents.

llms.title: Fine-Tuned Domain-Specific LLM with LoRA
llms.description: Fine-tune a Mistral-7B or LLaMA-3 model on a domain-specific dataset using LoRA/QLoRA. Deploy via Hugging Face Inference Endpoints.

generative ai.title: AI Image Generator App
generative ai.description: Build a web app that uses Stable Diffusion (via Replicate or AUTOMATIC1111 API) to generate images from text prompts.

generative ai.title: AI Content Marketing Tool
generative ai.description: Build a multi-step content generation pipeline that creates blog posts, social media captions, and meta descriptions from a keyword.

generative ai.title: Multimodal AI Assistant (Text + Image)
generative ai.description: Build a production multimodal assistant that processes text AND images using GPT-4V, with memory, tool calling, and a React frontend.

langchain.title: Simple Q&A Bot with LangChain
langchain.description: Build a Q&A bot using LangChain's LLMChain and PromptTemplate with a simple question-answering use case.

langchain.title: RAG Chatbot over PDF Documents
langchain.description: Build a chatbot that answers questions from uploaded PDFs using LangChain's document loaders, FAISS, and retrieval-augmented generation.

langchain.title: LangChain Agent with Tool Calling & Memory
langchain.description: Build a fully-featured AI agent with web search, code execution, calculator, and conversation memory tools using LangChain AgentExecutor.

llamaindex.title: Personal Notes Q&A with LlamaIndex
llamaindex.description: Index your personal notes (Markdown files) using LlamaIndex SimpleDirectoryReader and build a Q&A interface.

llamaindex.title: Multi-Document Comparison Engine
llamaindex.description: Use LlamaIndex to index multiple research papers and build a comparison engine that highlights similarities and differences across documents.

llamaindex.title: Agentic RAG System with LlamaIndex
llamaindex.description: Build an advanced multi-agent RAG system using LlamaIndex's ReActAgent, SubQuestionQueryEngine, and persistent vector storage with ChromaDB.

machine learning.title: House Price Prediction Model
machine learning.description: Build a regression model to predict house prices using the Boston or Ames Housing dataset with feature engineering and cross-validation.

machine learning.title: Customer Churn Prediction System
machine learning.description: Build an end-to-end ML pipeline for predicting customer churn with class imbalance handling, SHAP explanations, and a REST API endpoint.

machine learning.title: Recommendation Engine at Scale
machine learning.description: Build a collaborative filtering recommendation system using ALS (Alternating Least Squares) with hyperparameter tuning and evaluation metrics.

docker.title: Dockerize a Python Flask App
docker.description: Containerize a simple Flask REST API using Docker. Write a Dockerfile, build an image, and run it in a container.

docker.title: Multi-Service Docker Compose App
docker.description: Build a multi-container application (React frontend + FastAPI backend + PostgreSQL) using Docker Compose with environment configuration.

docker.title: Secure CI/CD Pipeline with Docker & GitHub Actions
docker.description: Build a full CI/CD pipeline that builds, tests, scans for vulnerabilities, and pushes Docker images to AWS ECR, then deploys to ECS.

kubernetes.title: Deploy App to Local Kubernetes (Minikube)
kubernetes.description: Deploy a containerized Python app to a local Kubernetes cluster using Minikube, writing Deployments and Services.

kubernetes.title: Kubernetes Microservices with Ingress & ConfigMaps
kubernetes.description: Deploy a 3-service microservices app (API + Worker + Database) with Kubernetes Ingress, ConfigMaps, Secrets, and HPA auto-scaling.

kubernetes.title: Production EKS Cluster with Terraform & Helm
kubernetes.description: Provision an AWS EKS cluster using Terraform, deploy apps using Helm charts, configure Prometheus + Grafana monitoring and alerting.

react.title: Personal Portfolio Website
react.description: Build a personal portfolio website with React featuring animated sections, a project gallery, and a contact form.

react.title: Real-Time Chat Application
react.description: Build a real-time chat app using React for the frontend and Firebase Realtime Database for messaging with auth and rooms.

react.title: Full-Stack E-Commerce Platform
react.description: Build a full e-commerce platform with React, Redux Toolkit, Node.js API, MongoDB, Stripe payments, and JWT authentication.

sql.title: E-Commerce Database Design
sql.description: Design and implement a normalized relational database schema for an e-commerce platform with CRUD operations and complex joins.

sql.title: Business Analytics Dashboard Queries
sql.description: Write complex analytical SQL queries (window functions, CTEs, subqueries) to generate business KPI reports from a sample dataset.

sql.title: Data Warehouse Architecture with dbt
sql.description: Design and implement a star schema data warehouse using PostgreSQL + dbt with incremental models, tests, and documentation.

penetration testing.title: OWASP Juice Shop Walkthrough
penetration testing.description: Complete all beginner challenges on OWASP Juice Shop (SQLi, XSS, broken auth) and document your findings in a pentesting report.

penetration testing.title: Internal Network Penetration Test Lab
penetration testing.description: Set up a vulnerable VM lab (Metasploitable, DVWA) and perform a full internal penetration test: reconnaissance, exploitation, post-exploitation.

penetration testing.title: Red Team Engagement Report
penetration testing.description: Conduct a full red team engagement simulation: OSINT, social engineering simulation, Active Directory attacks, lateral movement, and full professional report.

solidity.title: Simple ERC-20 Token
solidity.description: Deploy a basic ERC-20 fungible token on the Ethereum Goerli testnet using OpenZeppelin contracts and Remix IDE.

solidity.title: NFT Marketplace Smart Contract
solidity.description: Build an NFT marketplace with ERC-721 tokens, listing, buying, and auction functionality. Test using Hardhat and deploy to testnet.

solidity.title: DeFi Lending Protocol (Aave Clone)
solidity.description: Build a simplified DeFi lending protocol with collateralized borrowing, interest rate models, liquidations, and a React frontend.

python.title: Python CLI Task Manager
python.description: Build a command-line task manager with add/remove/list/complete features using Python, JSON file storage, and argparse.

python.title: Web Scraper & Data Pipeline
python.description: Build an automated web scraper for product data using Beautiful Soup + Selenium, store results in PostgreSQL, and schedule with Celery.

python.title: FastAPI Microservices Backend
python.description: Build a production microservices backend with FastAPI, async SQLAlchemy, Redis caching, JWT auth, Docker, and full OpenAPI documentation.
